name: Partial Contracts Suffice: Sound, LLM-Inferred Regression Verification

description: arXiv:2607.10291v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Software evolves continuously, yet ensuring that a patch preserves intended behavior without re-verifying an entire codebase remains difficult. Regression verification addresses this problem, but existing techniques require expensive whole-program reasoning or rely on manually written specifications that are rarely available in practice. We pres...
author: Yiannis Charalambous, Rafael Menezes, Youcheng Sun, Lucas C. Cordeiro
